explanation: Flexbox is ideal for one-dimensional layouts. justify-content controls main axis (horizontal), align-items controls cross axis (vertical). gap replaces margins between flex items.

title: CSS Grid photo gallery
description: Create a responsive photo gallery with CSS Grid where some images span multiple columns.
starterCode:

2
3
Wide
5
6
solution:
Featured
2
3
Wide
5
6
hints: span N to make element span multiple cells
explanation: CSS Grid is for two-dimensional layouts. grid-column: span 2 makes an element occupy 2 columns. grid-auto-rows sets implicit row height. 1fr means one fraction of available space.

title: Create CSS keyframe animations
description: Create a loading spinner and a pulsing button using CSS animations.
hints: animation shorthand: name duration timing-function iteration
explanation: CSS animations use @keyframes to define states. The animation property applies them. Always check prefers-reduced-motion for accessibility. CSS animations are GPU-accelerated when using transform and opacity.

title: Implement a dark/light theme with CSS Variables
description: Create a theme system using CSS custom properties that can switch between light and dark mode.
explanation: CSS Custom Properties (variables) enable dynamic theming. Changing the root variables instantly updates all elements using them. JavaScript can toggle themes by updating data attributes.

title: Make an accessible modal dialog
description: Create an accessible modal with proper ARIA attributes, focus trapping, and keyboard navigation.
solution:
Dialog Title

This dialog requires your attention.

Modal body content here.
hints: role='dialog' identifies modal to screen readers
Trap focus inside modal when open
explanation: Accessible modals need: role='dialog', aria-modal='true', aria-labelledby/describedby, focus trapping, Escape key to close, and focus restoration. This ensures keyboard and screen reader users can use them.
